title: Find My Device - Moving in and out of range
scenario: Test moving a Headset in and out of Bluetooth range while using the Find My Device feature, verifying disconnect/reconnect behavior and map pin color changes.
steps: Start the app with HS paired and connected, go to App Settings, tap Find My Device (allow GPS if prompted), and tap the connected HS from the bottom menu.
Move out of range — HS disconnects, "Out of range" view shown, map pin turns grey.
Move into range — HS reconnects, "Nearby" view shown, map pin turns blue.
expected: When moving out of range, the HS disconnects, an "Out of range" view is shown, and the map pin turns grey. When moving back into range, the HS reconnects, a "Nearby" view is shown, and the map pin turns blue.
